data.name: Login_BrandLead
data.value: Track every trip in real time and run your fleet from a single dashboard.

data.name: Login_WelcomeSub
data.value: Sign in to your account to continue managing your school.

data.name: SA_School_Logo_Hint
data.value: PNG, JPG, WebP, GIF or SVG up to 4 MB.

data.name: SA_School_Logo_UploadFailed
data.value: Upload failed. Try a different image.

data.name: SA_School_Map_Hint
data.value: Search for an address or click the map to drop a pin. Used by driver routes as the trip start/end.

data.name: SA_School_Password_Hint
data.value: Used only when creating the account.

data.name: SA_Sub_Section_Hint
data.value: Created with the school. Details can be edited later.

data.name: SA_Sub_Payments_Hint
data.value: Record each instalment as the school pays. The list below shows every payment captured for this subscription.

data.name: SA_Sub_Payments_FullyPaid
data.value: Subscription is fully paid — no further payments accepted.

data.name: SA_Sub_Paid_AutoHint
data.value: Auto-derived from the total of recorded payments versus the price.

data.name: SA_Sub_Remaining_AutoHint
data.value: Auto-computed from price minus the sum of recorded payments.

data.name: SA_Sub_Page_Sub
data.value: Manage each school's subscription history. Only one subscription can be active per school.

data.name: SA_Sub_Page_PickSchool
data.value: Pick a school from the dropdown to view its subscriptions.

data.name: SA_Sub_Page_NoSubs
data.value: No subscriptions for this school yet.

data.name: SA_Sub_Page_Failed
data.value: Failed to load subscriptions. Try refreshing or signing in again.

data.name: SA_ResetPwd_MinLenErr
data.value: Password must be at least 8 characters.

data.name: SA_Impersonate_Title
data.value: Open this school's admin dashboard with SuperAdmin privileges.

data.name: Impersonate_BannerFormat
data.value: You are signed in on behalf of {0}.

data.name: SA_Dash_Subtitle
data.value: Full management of every school subscribed to the TilmezBus platform.

data.name: SA_Dash_EmptyHint
data.value: Start by adding the first school to the platform

data.name: SA_Dash_ActiveUsers_Sub
data.value: Accounts currently enabled, grouped by role

data.name: SA_Dash_TodayUsers_Sub
data.value: Users who signed in at least once today, by role

data.name: SA_Schools_Filter_Empty
data.value: No schools match the current filters.

data.name: SA_Schools_SaveFailed
data.value: Save failed. Check the form data.

data.name: SA_Schools_ConfirmDelete
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the school "{0}"?

data.name: SA_Schools_EmptyHint
data.value: Start by adding the first school to the platform

data.name: SA_Notifs_ComposerSub
data.value: Compose a broadcast and pick its audience.

data.name: SA_Notifs_Schools_Hint
data.value: Hold Cmd / Ctrl to pick multiple. Leave empty for "all" when targeting admins.

data.name: Std_SectionParent_Sub
data.value: Name and phone — an account is created automatically

data.name: Std_SectionHome_Sub
data.value: Pick the location on the map

data.name: Std_MapHint
data.value: Click on the map to set the home location

data.name: Del_BodySuffix
data.value: will be permanently deleted and this action cannot be undone.

data.name: Driver_ImportHint
data.value: File must contain columns: FullName, PhoneNumber, DriverType

data.name: Validation_DriverType
data.value: Type must be Driver or Assistant

data.name: Validation_PhoneFormat
data.value: Phone must start with 77, 78 or 79 and be 9 digits long (+962 is added automatically)

data.name: Validation_TimeFormat
data.value: Time must be in HH:mm format

data.name: BusSchedule_ReturnAfterMorning
data.value: Return time must be after the morning time

data.name: Push_SentNoDevices
data.value: Sent — but the parent has no registered devices.

data.name: Student_ImportHint
data.value: First row must contain columns: FullName, Grade, ParentName, ParentPhone

data.name: Student_TemplateHint
data.value: An empty Excel template with the columns required for import

data.name: Bus_SearchPerson
data.value: Search by driver or assistant name...

data.name: Bus_QRHint
data.value: The driver or assistant scans this code from the mobile app to start the trip automatically.

data.name: Bus_Batch_Hint
data.value: Each bus number is generated automatically (BUS-0001, BUS-0002, …)
